sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Mini 8 is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Hannibal Park in Sousse, Sousse, Tunisia.



Red track and white supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
